dialogs.description: Deep in the DARKEST DEPTHS of this DUNGEON you find a fellow feline. But as you approach, you notice that this HORRIBLE 'cat' has decided to EMBRACE CAPITALISM. Now it is trying (AND FAILING!) to sell you its CRAP!

options.description: TAKE their POTIONS -- RESTORE your HEALTH
TAKE their DRUGS -- RESTORE your MANA.
TAKE their EYES -- WHY would you do THIS?

dialogs.description: You stole some SHIT! This cat is kind of BASED!
Donut begins to RIP OUT the EYES of the EVIL CAT, the SCREAMS can be heard ECHOING through the DUNGEON. You are a MONSTER
